hero.title: General School Info
hero.subtitle: Uniforms, schedules, meals, safety, and all the essentials for families at PS5.
uniform.heading: Uniform & Dress Code
uniform.prek.heading: Pre-K
uniform.kto5.heading: Kindergarten – Grade 5
uniform.kto5.bullet[0]: Boys: Navy slacks, yellow dress shirt, navy tie
uniform.kto5.bullet[2]: All students: Blue sweater only, black shoes (no sandals)
uniform.kto5.bullet[3]: Gym uniform: red apparel and sneakers
uniform.kto5.note: Navy shorts permitted in September/June (possibly October/May depending on weather).
uniform.middle.heading: Middle School (Grades 6–8)
uniform.middle.bullet[3]: Navy slacks/skirts (no tight-fitting pants), blue sweater, blue tie
uniform.middle.bullet[4]: Blue gym uniform with school logo
uniform.purchase.body: Gym uniforms at ken-u-print.myshopify.com. School uniforms from Children's Place, Target, Old Navy, Gap, and similar retailers.

schedule.times[0].label: Morning STARS
schedule.times[1].label: School doors open
schedule.times[2].label: Delayed opening
schedule.times[3].label: Dismissal Pre-K
schedule.times[4].label: Dismissal K–8
schedule.times[5].label: CASPER pick-up
attendance.heading: Attendance Notes
attendance.bullet[0]: Doors close at 8:40am — students arriving after are marked tardy.
attendance.bullet[1]: Students must stay until 12:45pm to avoid being marked absent.
faq.heading: FAQs
faq[0].question: How do I access my child's grades?
faq[0].answer: Pre-K: assignments sent by letter. Grades K–8: Google Classroom for work, Infinite Campus for grades.
faq[1].question: How do I contact my child's teacher?
faq[1].answer: Primary method is the district email (@jcboe.org). Teachers may also use Kaymbu, ClassTag, Class Dojo, or Remind.
faq[2].question: How do school meals work?
faq[2].answer: Breakfast is free for everyone. Lunch is $3 (free if qualified). Pay via the MySchoolBucks app.
faq[3].question: Athletic physicals — what do I need?
faq[3].answer: Submit page 5 of the completed physical packet to Nurse Moulton, then register via the Infinite Campus parent portal.
faq[4].question: My child has food allergies — what should I do?
faq[4].answer: Notify the school nurse. Classroom restrictions may be put in place depending on the severity.
faq[5].question: Medical forms — when are they needed?
faq[5].answer: Forms are sent home during the first week of school. Flu vaccines are mandatory until age 5.
faq[6].question: Can I enter the building?
faq[6].answer: For security, parents are not permitted in the building. Middle school students pass through metal detectors. All visitors must sign in at the main entrance.
